memory:memory/2026-05-12.md:1:17.snippet: # 2026-05-12 — EVEZ-OS Becomes Alive ## What happened - Received self-interrogation spine: 11 claims, 62.7% gap. Honest diagnosis: 63 code assets, $0 revenue, 0 users, 0 distribution. - User asked "What's missing?" and "Can EVEZ-OS build new forms of AI never attempted?" - I identified 6 critical gaps: no running instance, no state persistence, no feedback loops, no inter-system communication, no agent, and poly_c was a slogan not a function. - Built 5 new systems to close the gap. ## What was built 1. **poly_c.py** — The actual formula. `poly_c = τ × ω × topo / 2√N`.
